title: Golden Key Car Rental — Core Platform (Phase 1)

requirements.text: Design and apply a premium car rental visual theme across the entire application: deep charcoal/black background with gold (#C9A84C) accents, clean white typography, sharp card layouts, and a professional luxury feel. Use consistent spacing, bold headings, and a responsive layout that works on mobile and desktop. Apply the theme globally via Tailwind configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Gold and charcoal color palette is applied consistently across all pages
Typography is clean and legible in both English (LTR) and Arabic (RTL) layouts
All components follow a unified design language

requirements.text: Implement bilingual support (English and Arabic) with full RTL layout switching. The language toggle must flip the entire UI direction (dir='rtl' / dir='ltr') and swap all user-visible text strings between Arabic and English. Store the selected language preference in local state.
acceptanceCriteria: A language switcher (EN / AR) is visible in the navigation bar
Switching to Arabic flips the layout to RTL and translates all UI labels
Switching back to English restores LTR layout and English text
The selected language persists within the session

requirements.text: Build a car listings page with a search bar and filter panel. Filters must include: pickup location, return location, date range (pickup date / return date), car category (Economy, SUV, Luxury, Van), transmission type (Automatic / Manual), and maximum daily price. Display cars as responsive grid cards showing: car image, name, category, daily rate, availability badge, and a 'Book Now' button.
acceptanceCriteria: Car listing cards render with image, name, category, price, and availability
Filter panel allows filtering by location, dates, category, transmission, and price
Applying filters updates the displayed car list
Backend stores car records with all relevant fields (name, category, daily rate, availability, image URL, transmission)

requirements.text: Build a car detail page that shows full vehicle information: photo gallery, specifications, daily rate, real-time availability calendar, and a dynamic pricing calculator. The calculator must compute total cost based on selected rental duration, apply any active promo code discount, show early payment discount (if applicable), and reflect the selected currency. Support at least USD, AED, and EUR currency display.
acceptanceCriteria: Car detail page displays photo gallery, specs, and availability
Pricing calculator updates total cost dynamically as dates change
Promo code input validates against stored codes and applies the discount
Early payment discount is shown when the user selects full upfront payment
Currency selector updates displayed prices across the page

requirements.text: Build a single-page booking flow with the following steps rendered inline (no page navigation): (1) Rental details confirmation (dates, location, car), (2) Add-ons selection (child seat, additional driver, unlimited KM — each with an extra daily cost), (3) Customer information form (name, email, phone, driver's license number), (4) Payment method selection (Stripe credit card). Submit the booking and store it in the backend with status 'pending'.
acceptanceCriteria: All booking steps are visible on a single scrollable page with a progress indicator
Add-ons are selectable and their costs are added to the price summary
Customer information form validates required fields before submission
Stripe payment form is embedded and processes payment on submit
Successful booking creates a record in the backend with status 'pending' and all booking details

requirements.text: Implement a reviews and ratings system. Authenticated users who have a completed booking can submit a rating (1–5 stars) and a text review for a car. Display the average rating and all reviews on the car detail page. Store reviews in the backend linked to the car and user.
acceptanceCriteria: Review submission form appears on the car detail page for eligible authenticated users
Star rating (1–5) and text comment are required fields
Submitted reviews appear below the car details with author name, rating, and date
Average rating is calculated and displayed on the car card and detail page

requirements.text: Build a user dashboard (accessible after Internet Identity login) with four sections: (1) Profile Management — view and edit name, email, phone; (2) Booking History — list of all past and current bookings with status badges (pending, confirmed, cancelled, completed); (3) Invoice Download — each completed booking has a downloadable text/HTML invoice; (4) Booking Cancellation — users can cancel a booking that is still in 'pending' or 'confirmed' status.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard is protected and requires Internet Identity authentication
Profile section shows current user data and allows edits
Booking history lists all bookings with correct status badges
Invoice for completed bookings is viewable/downloadable
Cancel button appears for cancellable bookings and updates status to 'cancelled' in the backend

requirements.text: Build an admin dashboard (accessible via a protected admin route using Internet Identity, restricted to admin principal IDs stored in the backend). The admin dashboard must include: (1) Car Management — create, read, update, delete cars (CRUD with image URL, pricing, availability toggle); (2) Booking Management — view all bookings, change status (confirm, complete, cancel), process refund notes; (3) User Management — view registered users and their booking counts; (4) Promotions Management — create and deactivate promo codes with discount percentage and expiry date; (5) Revenue Reports — display total revenue by month and per-car breakdown.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin route is inaccessible to non-admin principals
Admin can add, edit, and delete car records
Admin can view all bookings and update their status
Admin can create promo codes with discount value and expiry date
Revenue report shows monthly totals and per-car revenue

requirements.text: Add a static Blog / CMS pages section. Create a blog listing page with article cards (title, excerpt, date, thumbnail) and individual blog post pages. Store blog posts in the backend with title, content (rich text as plain string), author, date, and published flag. Admin can create and publish blog posts from the admin dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Blog listing page displays all published posts as cards
Clicking a card navigates to the full blog post page
Admin dashboard has a 'Blog Posts' section to create and publish posts
Unpublished posts do not appear on the public blog listing

requirements.text: Add a floating WhatsApp contact button on all public-facing pages that opens a WhatsApp chat link (wa.me format) pre-filled with a greeting message: 'Hello, I am interested in renting a car from Golden Key Car Rental.' The phone number should be configurable in a frontend constants file.
acceptanceCriteria: A floating WhatsApp icon button is visible on all public pages (bottom-right corner)
Clicking it opens a new tab with the WhatsApp chat pre-filled message
The phone number is stored in a single constants file for easy update

constraints: Do not use Socket.io, WebSockets, or any real-time server-push technology — the platform does not support it
Do not integrate WhatsApp Business API as a server-side service — use wa.me deep links only
Do not integrate Google Analytics 4, Meta Pixel, or Microsoft Clarity scripts — external tracking scripts are out of scope for this build
Do not use PayPal SDK — Stripe is the only supported payment gateway
Do not use external email or SMS services (SendGrid, Twilio, etc.)
Authentication must use Internet Identity only — no Facebook, GitHub, or Auth0
All Motoko logic must remain in a single actor in backend/main.mo
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Excel bulk car import (not supported in this environment)
Google Analytics 4, Meta Pixel, and Microsoft Clarity integration
SEO schema markup, sitemap generation, and robots.txt (static file serving not configurable here)
Multi-currency conversion via live exchange rate APIs

required: Golden Key Car Rental hero banner — luxury car on a dark desert highway at night with golden light trails, wide cinematic composition (hero-banner.dim_1400x600.png)
Golden Key Car Rental logo — golden key icon with elegant serif text on a transparent dark background (logo.dim_320x100.png)
Placeholder car thumbnail — sleek silver sedan on a neutral dark background, studio-lit (car-placeholder.dim_600x400.png)
